tagline: The North Bay’s choice for dependable concrete pumping since 1981
seoDescription: Redwood Concrete Pump is a family-owned, women-owned concrete line pumping company in Santa Rosa, CA, serving Sonoma, Napa and Marin counties since 1981. Schwing SP 500 line pumps for residential, commercial and public works pours. Licensed, bonded and insured. Call (707) 538-1206.
heroHeading: Concrete Line Pumping You Can Count On in Sonoma County
heroSubheading: Family-owned in Santa Rosa since 1981. Schwing SP 500 line pumps for residential, commercial and public works projects across the North Bay.
highlights: Family-owned and operating in Santa Rosa since 1981
Women Business Enterprise (WBE) and registered Public Works contractor
Schwing SP 500 high-pressure line pumps (up to 45 cu. yd./hr, 1,100 PSI)
Serving Sonoma, Napa and Marin counties
Licensed by the California CSLB, fully bonded and insured
Crews specializing in long-distance and hillside pours
aboutHeading: Four Decades of North Bay Concrete Pumping
aboutBody: Redwood Concrete Pump was founded in 1981 by Eric and Vickie Worden, who started with a single old concrete pump and built it into one of Sonoma County's most established line pump operations. More than four decades later it remains a family-owned, women-owned business, with the next generation of the Worden family now involved in running the company.

The company runs Schwing SP 500 high-pressure line pumps, rated at roughly 45 cubic yards per hour and 1,100 PSI, with a 1.5-inch maximum aggregate size. That equipment, paired with operators who carry decades of pumping experience, lets the crew handle everything from tight residential driveways and pool decks to long-distance and hillside pours that boom trucks can’t always reach.

Redwood Concrete Pump serves Sonoma, Napa and Marin counties, including Santa Rosa, Petaluma, Healdsburg, Sebastopol, Sonoma, Rohnert Park and Cloverdale. As a California-licensed, bonded and insured contractor that is also a certified Women Business Enterprise and registered Public Works contractor, the company takes on residential, commercial and public-works jobs alike.

services.title: Residential Concrete Pumping
services.description: No project too small or too large. Line pumping for driveways, patios, pool decks, foundations, stem walls, walkways, fence footings and AC/generator pads for homeowners across the North Bay.

services.title: Commercial Concrete Pumping
services.description: Licensed contractors delivering high-quality service on commercial pours, including slabs, foundations, pier holes, solar piers and decorative hardscapes.

services.title: Public Works Projects
services.description: Registered Public Works contractor with certified payroll and the professionalism demanded by municipal and government jobs.

services.title: Long-Distance & Hillside Pours
services.description: High-pressure Schwing SP 500 line pumps built for long-distance and hard-to-reach hillside placements where access is limited.

services.title: Well Seals & Abatements
services.description: Specialty pumping for well seals, void filling and abatement work that requires precise, controlled concrete placement.

testimonials.quote: Their pump guy was efficient, clean and patient. The whole operation went very smoothly.
testimonials.author: Customer (via redwoodconcretepump.com)

testimonials.quote: Do yourself a favor and hire here guys. Their rates are reasonable and worth the exceptional service qualities listed above.
testimonials.author: Customer (via redwoodconcretepump.com)

notes:
CONFIRMED: This is the correct business. Phone (707) 538-1206 and address 1372 Los Alamos Rd, Santa Rosa, CA 95409 match across the live site, Yelp, BBB, and the bluebook. NOTE: the live, working site is redwoodconcretepump.com (singular "Pump"), NOT the supplied redwoodconcretepumping.com, which appears dead. Do not confuse with the similarly named but SEPARATE "Redwood Empire Concrete Pumping Equipment" (a Schwing parts/equipment supplier) in Santa Rosa.

VERIFIED FACTS (sources below): Founded 1981 by Eric and Vickie Worden; family/women-owned, multi-generational (Worden family — names Nichole, Corey, Vickie, Eric appear on site; Corey and "Diz" listed as operators). Equipment is LINE PUMPS (Schwing SP 500), NOT boom pumps — specs from their services page: ~45 cu yd/hr, 1.5" max aggregate, 74.5 HP Caterpillar diesel, 1,100 PSI, mounted on Ford F-450 flatbeds. Service area: Sonoma, Napa, Marin, Mendocino counties. CSLB license #639478 (per BBB/search). Site also cites WBE #1600964 and DIR Public Works #1000010460 — these specific registration numbers came from a single AI-summarized fetch of the site and were NOT independently cross-verified against CSLB/DIR databases, so I did not assert them in the customer-facing copy beyond the general WBE/Public Works claims.

CAVEATS / UNVERIFIED: (1) HOURS CONFLICT — the company's own site states Mon-Fri 7:00 AM-3:30 PM; Yelp/search summaries say 7:00 AM-6:00 PM. I used the site's hours (7-3:30) as more authoritative but this should be confirmed. (2) RATING: I could NOT extract a verified Yelp star rating or review count (direct Yelp fetch returned HTTP 403). Left rating empty rather than guess. Yelp shows "19 Photos" per the search snippet. (3) TESTIMONIALS are paraphrased/quoted from the site's testimonials as surfaced by WebFetch; verbatim accuracy is high-confidence but not 100% guaranteed since I could not view the raw page text. A longer review quote about office staff and operators also appeared via Yelp search snippet but I did not include it due to uncertain attribution. (4) "45+ years"/"45 Years of Family Craftsmanship" tagline appears on their site (1981->2026 = 45 yrs) — accurate. (5) Instagram and Google Business Profile URLs not confirmed, left blank. (6) Toll-free (800) 585-1206 and secondary (707) 254-1206 also appeared. (7) Email redwoodconcretepump@sonic.net. (8) Only TWO real photo URLs confirmed (wp-content/uploads banner images of their trucks); the gallery uses lazy-loaded placeholders so individual project photo URLs could not be extracted.

SOURCES: https://redwoodconcretepump.com/ ; https://redwoodconcretepump.com/services/ ; https://redwoodconcretepump.com/projects/ ; https://www.yelp.com/biz/redwood-concrete-pump-santa-rosa ; https://www.bbb.org/us/ca/santa-rosa/profile/concrete-contractors/redwood-concrete-pump-service-1116-158650 ; https://www.concretepumpers.com/content/redwood-concrete-pump ; https://www.thebluebook.com/iProView/1647726 ; https://www.facebook.com/RedwoodConcretePump/
